name: Emtricitabine / Tenofovir Disoproxil Fumarate
summary: Approved antiretroviral combination used as a contrast arm in the staged biological-age preprint, where no significant DNA methylation clock changes were reported.
mechanism_summary: Combines emtricitabine with the tenofovir disoproxil fumarate prodrug. In the staged post hoc geroscience source, FTC/TDF is a pharmacologic contrast to FTC/TAF rather than a positive aging-support signal.

open_questions: Whether tenofovir prodrug pharmacology explains the divergent FTC/TAF and FTC/TDF post hoc biomarker results
Whether FTC/TDF has any aging-relevant target-engagement signal in prospective studies
